About Us

We can help Navigate your Organization through Risks in the Marketplace.

We are a multidisciplinary, much like the organizations we partner with.

Our staff includes former members of the police and army, chartered accountants, MBAs, forensic experts, and consultants. Each team member has a unique background aiding businesses with information gathering, investigations, and security management. Our multidisciplinary team’s members collaborate to address sophisticated business threats.

Providing continuity between your strategic objectives and the implementation of tactical protections services. 

  • Business Legal Activity
  • Premium Management Consultancy
  • Result - Based Approach
  • 100% Government Statute Compliant
  • Stringent Ethical Standards
  • Our Goal is to add Value to Our Clients

Services Provided

Services We Offer

Document Verification

Our service in India is designed to check all the identity documents related to a person by advanced machine-readable algorithms.

Learn more

Due Diligence

We checks on targets and promoters like never before. Examine financial, legal, regulatory & reputational history of any target.

Learn more

Background Checks

We are one of the leading background verification companies in India. We offer the most reliable & cost-effective BGV services

Our team has the potency to work for all days and all hrs. In case of your any specific requirement we can help you.

High Team Work

Trust us, we have professionals with great skillsets

We are committed as a value catalyst to corporates bringing in innovative, cutting edge technology aided, risk advisory and intelligence management solutions that help clients not only mitigate risks but also enable better business decisions.

Time does matter

We understand, how timely availability of intelligence acts as a strategic leverage in conducting the investigations

We work traditionally & technologically

In today’s time evaluation of risk involves multiple checks of various domains. We use latest gadgets and software’s to prevent any kind of human error.

Working Proccess

Our Process is Simple & Easy

Step 1

You will Call

We will provide you with the best quote after knowing your requirements.

Step 2

Meeting Scheduled

We will meet and brief you about the strategy we will be following.

Step 3

Start Working

We will take the subject details and start the investigation as discussed.

Last Step

Submit Reports

Within the decided time frame we'll complete the project & submit the report

Answer Question

Frequently Asked Questions

We have tried our best in answering the mostly asked question. It will also help you to understand us. Please don’t hesitate to call us for your unanswered queries.

View All Question
How we can help You?

We are a professional risk and integrity management company that operates in emerging and frontier markets to advise clients on operational or business risk. Along with this we can also help you in private and all type of corporate investigation.

How much time a investigation takes to complete?

As such there is no such fix timeline exists, but we can give you a fair idea after understanding your requirements in details. The time calculation depends on the nature of problem and its complexity. For further details you ca reach us directly on our phone numbers.

What are the charges?

Calculation of the cost depends on the requirement of resources, services and time, Therefore we can only give you the cost breakup once the proposal is ready. Rest assured we are the most affordable service providers in the market.

What is your service area?

We are glad to inform you that our trained staff is capable to handle all type of investigation on Pan- India basis. Even in the past we have completed the overseas projects as well.

We are just a call away. Let's connect to proceed further

011 6931 4148
